reviews.review_text: We had a great time staying here. Warm friendly service on arrival. Nice clean amenities and parked our caravan with ease. First caravan place we've got to with synthetic turf for our pad. Lovely clean caravan park. Very quiet from road noise
We stayed here with the kids and had a great time! The beach is a short walk. Nice park overall.
Visited here many years ago and felt it was better then. Definitely one of the lower rated parks I’ve stayed at. The toilet block near games room should have a barrier to prevent major falls.

Very polite and good reception staff.
Location is beautiful.
Must recommended to stay here when you travel to philips island.

Nice quiet, clean,  well equipped park. Great position only 5 min drive to San Remo for everything you need.  The only negative was we didnt get beds that were advertised
on their site for 3 bedroom cabin.

Cabin was nice and clean and well equipped. Easy access to beach, which would be nice in summer, lots of shade from nice gum trees. Very quiet even when more people arrived on the weekend.

A great place to take the kids and make lasting memories! The San Remo pelican viewing is right across the bridge and not to be missed, we went twice, kids loved it! We'll definitely be keen to come back again, great value for money and so much fun for the kiddos!

We had a wonderful stay here with my family. The facilities were excellent—especially the kitchen and bathroom, which were clean, well-maintained, and very convenient. The common kitchen had everything we needed for cooking, making our stay feel comfortable and homely.

One of the highlights was the private beach access, which was just a short walk from the villa—perfect for relaxing and spending quality time together. Overall, a fantastic experience, and we would definitely love to come back again!
I loved this holiday park it made my four days at Phillip island brilliant!

A big shoutout to Tara and her team on duty the 13th of April. Made a mistake on booking the wrong date, however Tara was very patient and did everything she could to help us resolve the issue. She didnt need to but she truly went above and beyond to help us get the dates fixed. And her team for handling other guests while Tara assisted us with the date change. Best customer service we had ever received. The cabin rooms were excellent, and we thoroughly enjoyed our one-night stay. We will certainly be back again in the future and to make sure we have booked the right dates. Thank you once again, Tara!

We stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin. Upon arrival, check in was a breeze, and straight to the cabin. First impressions left us excited. The cabin was super clean and modern. It had all amenities necessary for a short stay. A couple of small things arose, but this didn’t dampen our stay, and were attended to quickly. The beach located just a stones throw was fun to explore in the mornings. We collected seashells, and explored the pools filled with fish and little crabs. There was a games room, where you could try your luck with the claw machines, play pac-man and have a round of table tennis. The jumping pillow was fun for kids, and the bbqs were clean and perfect for a cook up. Just a short stroll out of the park, a bakery that serves the most amazing treats and milk shakes left our kids buzzing! It’s a good location to stay, with just a 10 minute drive to forest caves, cape Woolamai surf beach and the famous chocolate factory.

We have an annual site at the park. We've been on the Island since 1980 in a family home and chose to buy in Newhaven because of the proximity to San Remo and the boat ramp. The crew here at Newhaven at the moment are AMAZING. It's great to feel the support and always appreciate the communication and professionalism of the staff. Graham and Tara are the best!
Great holiday park in Newhaven with easy access to the beach. Corner cabins can't park their car at the front as directed though.
Beautiful beaches with walking access to both sides of the wolomai peninsula half a day hike with the right timing and you can see a lot of wild life along the way as well.
Nice park

Great place to stay.  Cabins were very clean, staff were very friendly and helpful.  Its about a ten minute drive into phillip island town and about 5 mins to San remo, so very close to everything.

We stayed on a monday, Tuesday in march and it was very quite, but I would imagine this place gets booked out in summer as its right next to the water.

You cant actually see the water but if you walk thru some bushes and trees, which has a walking track you are on the water in just 1 minute from your cabin.

Booked an unpowered camping site out of season. Needed to cancel due to illness but there's a no refund for cancellation policy. Don't think this should apply for a patch of grass out of peak season. Should at least be a 50% refund.
Had a great time, lovely place to stay.
A great spot to stop for 3-5 days as usual. Great to see the continuing improvements, especially the turf powered sites.
Very clean and comfprtable room for 2. At the price the room should have a toilet
We had a trouble-free stay. Friendly, flexible staff. Lovely location. Good kitchen and bathroom facilities. Would stay again.

It's was excellent , toilet and shower was perfect clean and smell nice, camp kitchen was excellent for barbecue, was close by the highland bakery had a good pie there was thirteen of us enjoy the weekend away.
A great place to stay
Ideally located near beach and shopping. Very clean and modern facilities
A pleasant place to stay, would stay again.
Great powered site with excellent amenities
Great place. We had our little tear drop van with us. The best thing is that we are able to bring our dog. The staff are lovely too.
Loved the location and site fir the motorhome. Very clean and friendly.

Staff were friendly enough although they didn't return money to the kids when the games room machines took it.
Park was nice and close to water.

Wouldn't go back on a long weekend or recommend it.
Park can't control the type of people who stay but there were definitely alot of idiots, Elec bikes and scooters flying around nearly taking out kids is a joke.
No swimming pool. Not enough space for kids to play free sport e.g. cricket. Shower area/bathroom did not have hand wash liquid few times the day.

Very neat and clean, excellent communication and assistance
Ideal area

We stayed three nights here and were very impressed with the overall presentation, communication and cleanliness. Our last night was very different due to the long weekend and a full house. Despite there being no e bikes/scooters allowed there was one kid wizzing around most of the evening (ignored by one staff in a cart) and the basketball court was in use well after 10p.
Was so wonderful here. The workers are amazing the only pain was adding the wifi everyday into our phone and iPad. But over all absolutely loved it so much we extended a day
We stayed in our RV and had a wonderful time … amenities first rate and we would recommend to anyone … location was superb!
Terrific park and cabins. Perfectly clean and tidy everything you could need , close proximity to the beach a bonus   Couldn’t have asked for better place to stay. Five stars.
Excellent, great staff beautiful park, immaculate cabin. Highly recommended we will be back, thank you all for making our stay so enjoyable 😉

I have a Campervan so cannot rate the rooms. I found the park & facilities to be very clean & tidy. The staff member was most friendly & helpful. On my site access to power required a very long lead as did access to sullage.

First off, enjoyed our stay with our family who were in caravan site. However I was disappointed to find out on the parks website that the cabin we were in was advertised at $89 per night whereas I paid in excess of $249 for two nights which also included membership discount.
Great  service and  great staff and great place  to stay
Amazing location, awesome staff, clean amenities. Can’t ask for anything more. Fabulous place to stay.

Lovely 1b
But I did think you could squeeze a toilet in where the clothes horse wd be.
Wd be great to have a toilet.
As I get older I go to the toilet alot and ibthink this could be a great plus for yr business
Loved the grassy unpowered site, thanks!
Extremely clean cabins
clean cabins, easy beach access, spare parking close by. bit pricey and no pool or small kid playground but would happily stay here again

Very disappointing stay from 19–23 January 2026 in a Villa Cabin.
On arrival, both TVs didn’t work and the sink mixer only had cold water. These were not fixed until the following day, meaning our first night was impacted. We were woken early the next morning by loud garden maintenance directly outside our cabin with no prior notice.
The cabin also shook noticeably at times, which was concerning, and the explanation provided was not reassuring. There is no swimming pool, and the nearby beach was unpleasant due to March flies and strong winds, leaving very limited options to actually enjoy the location.
We left a day early and were later refused any refund due to policy.
For the price paid, this did not meet basic expectations. We would not return or recommend.

Great holiday caravan park
Staff were so happy and helpful
Thank you

What a great spot! Stayed on the unpowered grass site and it was great. Clean amenities. Close to lots of attractions, and lots of activities for kids.
Only bummer was the very early wake up with a linen truck (before 7am 🤪) unloading, pushing loud trolleys, and beeping waking the entire site up early. Also I feel like there should be a cut off time for late arrivals - we were woken on the second night by very loud campers setting up at almost 10.30pm which definitely dampens the vibe.
캠퍼벤  파워사이트 이용했습니다.전기,수도,세탁,키친,위치,청결,소음,주변 이동 경로 모든게 깔끔했습니다.

When you book an early bird and then get in one day earlier and need to pay $15 more it’s a bit annoying then you ask us to stay an extra day for $10 less no consistency in pricing and only just managed to fit on site the draw bar was on the road and very tight getting on to site
We have a great stay at Phillip Island with you guys, everything was great, toilets and showers are the best I have seen at any caravan park, well done

We had a wonderful couple of days on Phillip Island. Stayed at the Big4 Ingenia which was a lovely park. Although just off the main road after the bridge it was quiet, had beautiful shady trees and 3 points of direct access to the beach. The amenities were very clean & tidy as was the whole park. We had a 3 bedroom villa cabin which was great. Everything was provided and the kitchen well stocked. We had international guests with us and they were blown away with the beauty of the park. I would highly recommend this Big 4 holiday park.
Very clean, friendly staff, small enough the kids can ride around

Stayed at this site for two nights in a motorhome.  The site was very clean and tidy with access to the beach.  The toilet and shower block was kept exceptionally clean and the staff were very friendly and helpful.  Ideally located for exploring the island.

Awesome
Needs a bbq on the deck
Very clean amenities,credit to the staff,nice park,helpfull staff, only complaint, power access for site 55  is aprox 16 mtr,and no tv antenna piont.
Lovely place to spend a few days in the van. Great location, close to the beach and great local shops, highly recommend!
Best family accommodation and even better staff. You will love this place!
Amazing service, and staff. Super helpful and patient with you. Amazing place to stay amenities are nice and clean. Definitely a nice place to stay for a little get away
Lovely place for kids and families. The kids had an absolute ball here and especially loved the pedal cart hire!

Stayed on a caravan site park and amenities are always clean and fresh quiet and relaxing the two young receptionists were very helpful and friendly nothing was a problem for them

Tom
Great caravan park....very friendly staff

We had a nice grassy site for our camp trailer and 4wd. Although the site was a bit small, which we knew beforehand, it wasn't very busy so had space each side most of the time. The campground total area is small but well kept.
All in a nice, clean and well located van park.
Absolutely loved it! The caravan sites are a little bit smaller than others we’ve been too but it is so clean! The staff are so friendly and welcoming! We can’t wait to go back
Excellent location for beach access to have a relax or fishing 🎣 great little park with neat setup and large sites. Everything works and very neat and upgraded bathrooms are good.
Staff on arrival were very helpful and friendly.  Cabin was clean and well equipped.  Upon departure staff member was again friendly and accommodating.   Would definitely recommend.
Great level powered site close to beach access. Facilities modern and kept clean . All staff very friendly and helpful.Peaceful location close enough to most attractions on the island.

Propper Holiday Park at the beginning of Phillip Island. Takes you about 20-25mins to the penguin parade. We arrived later than 5pm because of traffic. There was an emergency number to call and luckily they placed our keys in a box that had a code. Would still be easier if that number would also reachable via WhatsApp as we didn’t have an Australian number and had to ask other guests to borrow their phone. The rooms were simple but had almost everything we needed, a little smelly though. A lot of rabbits in the park.
Great park

We were so happy with everything about the place, location, service, staff and how well the overall place is kept, the best thing we can say is that we definitely will be back.
Thankyou
Relaxing nice vibe to the park .
Very nice park to stay at with the family- right on the beach and short walk to shops
Great place to take your kids close to beach , got games room, inflatable jumping pad , go karts for hire daily

We stayed at a powered site with our camper van
Great facilities- bath and toilets, big kitchen. Looks organized.
Stay was good
Really loved our long weekend holiday. Amenities are great for kids and families!

I stayed at power site and space is so small that i hardly fit my tent . I wouldn’t recommend for power site but their facility and service is excellent clean and tidy . But wouldn’t recommend power site it just so conjusted looks like they tried to fit more site in small space not worth for money.

The worst of the worst campground, total rip off, small camp areas, terrible staff, nothing but gambling machines for kids. Sea is terrible, amenities are inadequate, no shade, not enough parking space.. never never again!

We stayed in a 1-bedroom cabin and it was modern, clean, and had everything we needed for a great family holiday. The cabin was well set up and very comfortable. The staff were genuinely friendly and welcoming, which made our stay even better. The location is fantastic too, close to all of the attractions that Phillip Island has to offer. We really enjoyed our time at BIG4 Ingenia Holidays Phillip Island and would happily stay again.

I complained on day 2 about the rooms because they were so dirty that my kids and I were coughing. The staff were responsive and came to clean some of the dirt but you could tell a deep clean hadn't been done in a long time. Just layers of grim on windows and in corners on the floor. I asked for a refund and to go home early but it wasn't worth the fight in the end.

The bedrooms were really hot and the aircon doesn't reach them. The fans don't work well and when on high are so rickety it's like they'll come off. From 7am to 10pm it's loud: basketballs, kids running around, yelling and running up and down our balcony. Made it hard for my baby and preschooler to sleep.

We left a day early as we had had very little sleep from the heat and I had hives from dust mites.

The arcade room really needs fans or an aircon.

Pros are the jumping mat and meeting new families.

We stayed in our camper trailer ,and all the staff were very friendly and very professional, all the grounds were kept in excellent condition , the amenities kept in the  cleanest l have ever seen , we will be definitely be back there.
Great experience second time we stay there and will definitely be back… lovely team members

Hey there,
Just I want to complain about it. Until last night everything was fine, but around 11 pm a noisy, large-displacement black RAM truck drove through the entire campsite and stopped in front of our tent for 5 minutes, talking inside with the engine running! And they woke up all the children! And supposedly, noise is prohibited after 10 pm, and vehicles shouldn't be allowed to enter or leave after 10 pm, as is the case in most of the high-quality campsites we've visited in recent years. The Thank you very much.

We stayed on a van site, out the back. No grass.. lots of sand. It was nice to be tucked away from the mass crowds in the park.
Amenities were extremely clean at all times of the day and smelt really fresh.  Good walking location to San Remo, the beach and bakery!
Staff were very welcoming and friendly, happy to answer any questions we had.
The jumping pillow was small but the kids still enjoyed it. The basketball ring was definitely a highlight as not Manypeaks we visit have them Although small it was a sanity saver!
Short drive into Cowes to either shop or eat.

First time camping, booking, paying and setup and pack down was very straight fwd.
Our first night was quite late (nearly 1am) thanks to excessive noise from neighbouring campers, however they were quiet for the next three nights, and the text reminders to guests around the site quiet time policy was appreciated.
Well equipped and spotless cabin. Camp staff very friendly and helpful

We stayed in a two-bedroom cabin which was small and compact, but absolutely perfect for a short family getaway. The cabin was spotless, and the staff were incredibly friendly and helpful throughout our stay. We really loved the relaxed, family-friendly atmosphere of the park.

The only minor suggestion for improvement would be the curtains in the bunk room, which were a bit small for the windows and made settling the kids during daylight savings a little tricky. That said, this wouldn’t stop us from coming back again — we’d happily stay here again!

Great service and easy to book when you call them. Lots of options for all kinds of campers.
Took my 3yr old and she loved it.
Beach backs onto the park, with play equipment on site as well for children.
Recently stayed with our caravan. Great location and excellent facilities.

We stayed in an unpowered camp site, the camp area was clean and well maintained. It’s close to the camp kitchen and toilets.

The available amenities were all kept clean and in great condition. The camp kitchen offers multiple grill/bbq hot plates, two stove stops, an oven, microwave, toaster and jet boil for instant hot water. As well as a fridge to store your food and lots of tables to eat at.

Large bathroom block included an accessible shower/toilet room, a laundry and seperate men’s and women’s rooms. These were also very clean and well maintained.

The staff here were fantastic during our stay, but a special shoutout to one staff member, Wednesday, who helped us set up a movie in the on site theatre room, and gave dinner recommendations for local dining.

With beach access, lots of wildlife to be seen around the park, including ducks, rabbits and an assortment of wild birds. Play grounds for the kids and an arcade room. You couldn’t ask for more.

Not too far from town. Has jumping pillow, lots of toilets and private beach access. Camp kitchen has lots of fridge space, a small freezer, hot plates and all the usual stuff. Place is very clean and organised. Full of friendly families. The kiddies love the flat roads for their scooters. Gets cold at night in phillip island. Pack warm clothes as wind makes it feel colder.

Stayed in our campervan so cannot give a rating for rooms. (Although they looked nice from the outside). I can say the camp site was just right, well kept and perfect for our litte campervan. Lovely site next to some gum trees and  within a short walk through the bush to the beach. Great facilities and friendly staff. Highly recommended. We will be back. 😊

A beautiful park. Right on the bay. Large sites. Great kids facilities and kids club. Very friendly and helpful staff. Had great live music one night. Very well maintained and clean. Lovely big shady trees.
Absolutely beautiful area to stay in. Friendly staff and was amazing to have the beach access 😍 will be visiting again

Great service - very friendly and helpful
Great location close to the beach, shops and restaurants
Accommodation - a bit tight for four people or more
Had a great stay overall. Thank you
The beach next door is good for kids with no surf.
Great location. Very clean facility. Overall, park kept clean, tidy and a pleasure to stay. Friendly and helpful staff.  Highly recommend.

Great caravan park, the facilities are great and clean. The staff were extremely friendly and helpful. The activities for the grandchildren were entertaining. The location is ideal, adjacent to the beach, a short walk to San Remo for groceries or a feed. This is the second time we've stayed here and will definitely come again. The only negative is the grandchildren weren't keen to swim at low tide due to the sea grass, a water park for the little ones would be a great addition.

Another beautiful stay at big 4 Phillip island always a pleasure staying here the kids love it just as much as I do great location staff are wonderful so much to do will definitely come back soon a+++
The staff at this caravan park were wonderful. Facilities were kept clean and well maintained. The location is perfect for exploring Phillip island. We can't wait to come back again.

Great campsite, friendly helpful staff and great location.
Good Facilities (2 kitchens), beach access (tho not the best beach, lots of small sticks, sharp twigs etc) and few small playgrounds but you'll need to venture off site for main activities - very close, 10-20 mins of most stuff so easy and quick access, would book again
We stayed in our caravan . Very clean showers and toilet. the staff were so friendly and welcoming, nothing was too much trouble. Will stay there again.
We stayed 2 nights in a villa. It was a good stay. The atmosphere is great for family , with heaps of children running around and playing but feeling safe for kids.

We had a wonderful five-day trip planned for our family vacation. We were all quite tired from the year-end festivities and very much looked forward to relaxing and spending quality time together.

This was our first visit to the park, and it is certainly a place we would like to return to. The morning activities, led by Stacey, were excellent. Our daughters, aged 8, 6, and 5, were eager to wake up and engage in creative pursuits. We were thoroughly entertained by The Sullivans; they are a delightful family and wonderful performers. My daughters still enjoy singing the chicken song. The Family Show, performed by Corrie, was also incredibly enjoyable. The children had a fantastic time and remained entertained for the entire 2 hours, which I found very impressive.

I particularly appreciated the availability of a coffee van from 8-11 am, which is truly a dream for any parent.

The beach was conveniently located just a three-minute walk away, which was an added bonus.

Our two-bedroom cabin was equipped with everything we required. It was clean and perfectly sized for our family, and our daughters especially loved the bunk beds.

A significant highlight for us was the opportunity to connect with other families. We met some lovely people and enjoyed relaxing together while our children formed bonds and created lasting memories.

The most challenging part was saying goodbye. Thank you, Big 4 @Phillip Island, for providing the perfect way to welcome the New Year.

We eagerly anticipate visiting you again.
Great family atmosphere

It was our first time in the holiday park. Family five we booked deluxe cabin it was a tiny accommodation, but has all you need for a short stay.
Kitchen was fully equiped. Linen and bathroom necessity provided.
Wifi was bad, but we were so exhausted after  the beach we don’t care, plus the food pressure of the shower helped to forget that we don’t have tv and we went straight to sleep.
Park is nice, very packed, but has activities like rent a bicycle, karts, pool, jumping mat and small game zone, I would I complain about the game zone particularly the lollies machines, what a rip off, so many kids was upset, so much money spent and nothing coming out…-
Communication with the operators/staff was amazing, check in fast, very nice and friendly. Would definitely come back again for a longer stay, just need to book far in advance for a school holidays…
Great quiet place, away from the chocked traffic areas of Cowes.
Great stay, camp facilities and rooms are very clean... shared amenities very shiny and well serviced.. highly recommended 👌
Always amazing to stay at , and I loved the morning visit from the ducks at our door :)
Awesome park great friendly staff and clean tidy and very family oriented atmosphere great location, enjoyed it all the way

We booked a caravan site which was great,the artificial grassed area was a great idea for sitting under the awning ,On arrival and during our stay the staff were fantastic and very friendly which made our stay a happy one and we extended our stay by 3 days.

Omgosh Wednesday in reception was a hoot. Was quirky and funny and kept up with my annoying husband's jokes.
The park was lovely and the sites were clean. And the facilities also.
Fantastic caravan park. Location is excellent,  staff wonderful.. spotless facilities... you helped up out heaps.. Phillip Island was a memorable place .. Thankyou
Cute little cabin, fully contained with all basic amenities.  Will come again.

Absolutely beautiful spot with direct access to the beautiful ocean . I stayed down the back of the park near the holiday homes just before busy season and it was so peaceful that I will definitely be back again. Thanks!

Over all good experience but I will not visit again want to try something new.
Staff was good.
Good location

Location location location. Flat sites. Very clean. Amenities excellent.
One tiny criticism re: dryer. $6 for 30 minutes and clothes were still wet.
Other than that, I would gladly go there again.
Very good especially dog friendly and very close to the beach
Fabulous facilities, brilliant location with a quick trail through to the beach! Park staff were wonderful, housekeeping very thorough in finding forgotten jewellery, very highly recommended!
Beautiful spot, loved the beach access and amenities were always clean! The staff at reception were really helpful and friendly. Thanks for a great stay!

Fantastic friendly staff, extremely helpful & accommodating on a quiet powered site after driving thousands of km’s to catch up with family & friends. “Thank you” much appreciated and perfect spot down the back very little walk to amenities, laundry & camp kitchen.

Beautiful park extremely clean & tidy and extremely well maintained. Amenities “Wow” absolutely spotless well everything is spotless in this park. Lot of kids but you wouldn’t know it extremely well behaved and friendly & helpful parents.
Great location to view pelican feeding, beach walks and watch penguin come to shore or on walks

What a beautiful place to exhale and chill. The staff were wonderful, warm and friendly and the one bedroom cabin was spotlessly clean and I needed absolutely nothing.
The whole park was quiet and serene and just what I needed as a break before my Christmas crazy starts.
Thank you so much for four days of wonderful.
Great place to stay, very helpful and friend staff.  Highly recommend.

We needed a week away so Phillip Island scored. Newhaven is just over the bridge from San Remo & that's where we stayed in a very nice 2 bedroom villa. The amenities were plentiful, the villa just the right size for us two, good shopping at San Remo & around the island. A lovely long beach was close by. Overall it was a peaceful & lazy week. Thank you.

I had a fantastic stay. The place was spotless, very clean, and incredibly quiet — perfect for relaxing. The location couldn’t have been better: super close to the beach and conveniently placed near everything you might need. The view was amazing as well. Overall, a really lovely stay. I would highly recommend it!

We had such a great time at BIG4 Ingenia Holidays Phillip Island! The place is super clean and well looked after. All the staff were really friendly and welcoming. The location is perfect — the cabins are right next to the beach and close to pubs, cafés, shops, and restaurants.

There’s so much to do here! Jumping pad, adventure playground, basketball ring, recreation room with table tennis, TV, games, and even pedal go-kart hire. There’s also free Wi-Fi and paid streaming options like Netflix, Prime Video, and YouTube.

We had such a relaxing stay — definitely coming back again!

Wish I could give 0 stars!! Do not book with this place!! They gave us the wrong site to put our tent so we could install anything and had to leave. Lady at reception said she’ll add the difference as credit on my account to use at any other big 4. Now all of a sudden there’s no credit and we can’t use it, asking for a refund and is getting completely ignored .. rude staff, unhelpful and I DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS PLACE
Clean and comfortable, enjoyed my stay

The cabins are well stocked and flawlessly clean upon entry. Had Wednesday in both my interactions with front reception and she was absolutely lovely, upon departure asked all about our stay at the cabin/our holiday in general. Very friendly and chatty.

The park was quiet in the week we were there minus the last day and it was amazing. The beach is a short walk out of the park up a sandy hill. Close to all other main activities on the island, in the perfect spot. The park is in an amazing location. There was often rabbits, geese and possums throughout the park (not when it got busy though).

We've stayed at about 6 Big 4 parks/partner parks at least. The beds were super comfy at this one and the cabin was well stocked with everything we needed for our week stay (at some you're lucky to get an extra bag or toilet roll). Also loved that the TVs were smart TVs! One of the first we've been at with them.

Would 100% stay again in future.
Had a powered site, great park well set out, nice flat pads, I am empressed.
Clean and quiet except for the groundsman who used his smelly petrol blow vac early mornings. Maybe he could do that job after 10am when people are going out for the day or leaving?! Just a thought!

What a fantastic caravan park! Not only is it quiet, clean, and run by friendly staff, but the location is also great. The grounds are very well maintained, and we loved the shower amenities — especially the screen doors that keep the water in. The camp kitchen was spacious and well-equipped with everything you need to cook. My hubby and I thoroughly enjoyed our stay and would happily return.

Cabin was clean, comfortable & a the perfect size
Staff were welcoming, friendly, considerate & very helpful
Great location seconds from the beach, lots of things for kids & adults to do, quiet & peaceful
Highly recommend to all looking for an all over comfortable & relaxed holiday
This caravan park was clean, tidy and we had a lovely stay for 3 nights
Amazing camp site, bathroom and shower tidy and clean.

We stayed for a weekend with our young children. The cabin was clean and comfortable, and the park had multiple playgrounds and a jumping pillow for the kids. We loved that the beach was accessible from the holiday park too! We had read a few negative reviews about the park and were a little unsure of what to expect, but we honestly had no issues and really enjoyed our stay!
Great park just over the bridge from San Remo. Easy access to the beach as well as all the sights. 30 minutes from Penguin Parade. Great camp kitchen

I can not fault this Big 4. It was everything we could have asked for. I wish it was warmer so we could utilise the beach more. And if I genuinely would choose something I would have loved an indoor pool. The staff here are absolutely incredible and with how busy they were this long weekend every staff member was so attentive. Can not wait to come stay here again in the future.
Comfy beds. Winning! Clean and cosy cabin with everything needed for a short stay. Everyone was helpful and cheerful. My puppy liked the cabin and the great places to walk.
Enjoyable
In my whole time in Australia this was the best place i stayed, best time of my life
Good location

Fantastic holiday park. Next to beach which was perfect for us and our dog.
Location was close to all the shops and restaurants. Had a relaxing stay and definitely coming g back again.
We absolutely loved our stay. Our cabin was super neat and tidy. Only reason I didn't give 5 stars was due to the small room sizes.
We had two powered sites. I must say that the amenities were the cleanest I've ever seen! Playgrounds, jumping pillow, games rooms, all great. Beach nice for a walk after dinner.
Had an amazing stay loved the position and the ammenities were very clean and modern will be returning back here in the near future
A very comfortable clean and tidy park with friendly staff at a great location.
Bath rooms and toilets are shiny. Reception is courteous and very nice. This park is lucky to have such staff. Look after them and they will look after your business.

We stayed at BIG4 Ingenia Holidays Phillip Island and my family really enjoyed the time spent there. The location is right next to the beach on walkable distance. It has clean amenities and the staff is very helpful. I would always recommend people to stay at the location. We booked powered site for our camping trip. A+++++++++
The facilities were really nice and it’s a convenient location! It was also nice, quiet, and clean.
Amazing experience! The Park is located in a privileged area with easy access to the beach. All the sites were looking really nice and Park was very well kept. Will definitely stay there again.

Clean amenities
Fantastic location
Great and friendly staff

We arrived around 4pm and it was still not ready so we were not able to check in before we headed off to the Penguin Parade which was annoying. The staff member was apologetic and asked if they could do anything to compensate us for the inconvenience, so I requested a late check out for the morning which was declined. I was offered some wine which I took, even though we don’t drink. Disappointing. Another aspect that we were disappointed with was the kids play room. It had an old school Pac-Man table (which was free and awesome). There was table tennis table with no ball of paddles in sight, a few books and giant chess and jenga. Other than that, there were TEN claw machines, some sort of shooting game and an air hockey table which all required payment. The games room could do with a big overhaul - parents don’t want to have to pay for rubbish games!
With all of that said, our kids were invited to go to the “kids club activity” shortly before check out, which they did with Stacey (I believe that was her name). We recently stayed here and were very excited about our weekend away.
Apon Arriving for a weekend trip everything looked great, location seemed on point and cabins were spacious. However a park designed for families, I did start to notice the cons. We arrived on a Friday afternoon and the Arcade was closed at a very early hour which makes no sense due to it being a weekend at a family venue catering for kids. The jumping pillow was not well maintained for the time we were there. We booked a 3 bedroom cabin and they appeared great on the outside but low maintenance was visible once entering. One section of the lounge was broken, tv was faulty, bed and bed frames had seen much better days. I have been to alot of Big4's and most are fantastic however was disappointed with our stay. On-top of that once we left I ensured the cabin was at standard for departure just like leaving a hotel room, however was charged an extra $100 nearly a week later for "excessive cleaning" due to having some dishes neatly placed and rinsed on the kitchen side. I find this absolutely appalling that a facility with an in-house room/cabin cleaning prep procedure regardless of what's on the fine print can be ok charging this for 2-5mins of work. I have never in all my years in holidaying away or staying somewhere local have encountered this. I can understand if the room was left in a state that required +hours of cleaning but not a few rinsed dishes left neatly beside the sink.

Although we had a nice stay we were left with a sour taste after receiving a phone call saying we were to be charged $100 for cleaning for something we didn't do at any stage. Fortunately though we weren't. What would have been a good review has left us disappointed. Maybe the same level of scrutiny could be applied to the sink that doesn't hold water, the hand basin in the bathroom with a rusty ring, the dish cupboard which has a broken hinge or the television which looses signal to channel 10.
